cards.name: Clad in Many Colours
cards.actionEffect: Allied units in radius 1 gain Fortified and ArcaneInsight (1 turn); enemies in radius 1 gain Despair (1 turn).

cards.name: Sackville-Baggins Grudge
cards.quote: A good name may be guarded more fiercely than gold.
cards.actionEffect: All Hobbits in the hex are Blocked <sprite name="blocked"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Uncautious Supper
cards.quote: A flame unwatched at meal may summon the long eye of night.
cards.actionEffect: At supper or rest, Hobbits in radius 2 lose Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> and take 15 damage.

cards.name: Rhun
cards.quote: Rhun is a far shore of smoke and mounted dust, where distant thunder gathers.

cards.name: Caradhras
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Freezes enemy units on mountain tiles in radius 5.

cards.name: Restless East
cards.actionEffect: The two easternmost allied armies gain +1 <sprite name="hc"> and +1 <sprite name="lc">

cards.name: Under the Rhunic Sun
cards.actionEffect: All Easterling units gain Courage (1 turn).

cards.name: Raid From The Mountains
cards.actionEffect: All allied army commanders in mountains or hills gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn) and Courage <sprite name="encouraged"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Storm from Orthanc
cards.quote: Saruman's word falls like iron from the tower, and the weary find themselves driven to one more deed.
cards.actionEffect: All friendly units in this hex can action again.

cards.name: LureOfTheEast
cards.actionEffect: All enemy Maia aligned free or neutral in radius 2 are teleported to random eastmost non-water hexes and Blocked (1 turn).

cards.name: Sand Storm
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Halts all non-Southron units on desert tiles.

cards.name: Scents of the Haradrim
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: deal moderate damage and apply Poisoned (2 turns).

cards.name: Easterling Resolve
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified (1 turn) and Haste (1 turn).

cards.name: ElvesGoingWest
cards.actionEffect: Apply Despair (1 turn) to all elves in radius 2.

cards.name: TheLureOfTheSenses
cards.actionEffect: Block target enemy character for 1 turn. If it is a Maia, block it for 3 turns.

cards.name: Cruel Winter
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. All mountain enemy units have 7.5% chance to become Frozen.

cards.name: Twilight
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event: in radius 2, reduce visibility and clear scouting; allied dark-aligned PCs there become temporarily hidden.
